title: smoke-hot peruvian lamb casserole
description: a creamy, energizing peruvian dish featuring lamb shoulder, with a smoky twist
instructions: trim excess fat from lamb shoulder and cut into 1-inch pieces.
heat oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat. add lamb and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
add onion and garlic to skillet and cook until softened, about 3 minutes.
stir in chili flakes, paprika, and cumin; cook for 1 minute.
add chicken broth and bring to a boil; stir in quinoa and reduce heat to low; cover and simmer for 15-20 minutes, or until liquid is absorbed.
stir in coconut milk and smoked paprika.
transfer lamb and quinoa mixture to a 9x13-inch baking dish.
cover dish with aluminum foil and bake for 25-30 minutes, or until lamb is tender and quinoa is heated through.
remove foil and bake for an additional 10-15 minutes, or until top is lightly browned.
season with salt to taste; garnish with chopped cilantro, if desired.
